final:
// // This module implements a reset controller with an active-low reset signal. When the reset signal is asserted (low), all output signals are reset to zero. When the reset signal is deasserted (high), the output signals follow the input signals.
module reset_controller(
    input wire clk,
    input wire reset,
    input wire [3:0] in_data,
    output reg [3:0] out_data
);
    always @(posedge clk or posedge reset) begin
        if (reset) begin
            out_data <= 4'b0000; // Reset output to 0
        end else begin
            out_data <= in_data; // Follow input data
        end
    end
endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module implements a reset controller with an active-low reset signal. When the reset signal is asserted (low), all output signals are reset to zero. When the reset signal is deasserted (high), the output signals follow the input signals.
